Quaerere * Group:
	1. ex __app_name__ Transibit ad ludum.
	2. ICTUS in "__search_known_value__" puga pyga in "__search__" tab.
	Petentibus coetus potenti 3. quaero quaero.
		Format: value 1 __semicolon__ value 2 __semicolon__ ... __semicolon__ value N __colon__ group size
		2-__max_group__ values can be searched at the same time. The default group size is 512. The group size must be between 2 and 65536.
		For example, if you want to search 195 and 6543, you should input:
			195 __semicolon__ 6543
		Of course you can specify the group size (300):
			195 __semicolon__ 6543 __colon__ 300
		Item, notitia typus vos can vel posuit:
			195__type_dword_short__ __semicolon__ 6543
		This means you want to search a __type_dword__ value that is 195 and an __type_auto__ value that is 6543.
		Posse eadem data sunt rationes quaerere:
			__type_byte_short__ - __type_byte__
			__type_word_short__ - __type_word__
			__type_dword_short__ - __type_dword__
			__type_xor_short__ - __type_xor__
			__type_qword_short__ - __type_qword__
			__type_float_short__ - __type_float__
			__type_double_short__ - __type_double__
			__type_auto_short__ - __type_auto__
		Etiam vos potestis scribere numero in hexagonis traversa (minus-endian) notatio:
			__hex_example____hex__ __semicolon__ 6543
		hexagonem illustratum movetur in principio, aut (magna-endian) notatio:
			__hex_example____rhex__ __semicolon__ 6543
		Ad initus additional characteres, uti «__btn_hex__" tange bullam RURSUM internum eorum magister loquitur.
	4. Select idoneam ad genus notitia, vel eligere '__type_auto__ "(Si vos es certus non est) utor ut default. Alia options quia in quaestionibus huius generis non refert. Click "__search__".
	5 Postquam complevit investigatione, quaero praecessi ero propono in album.
	6. Ad ludum. Mutata post pretii: __app_name__ vertas, iterum.
	7. Repeat coetus investigationem oportet mutationes.
	8. If there are too many results, repeat steps 6 and 7.
	9. Quod si pauci sunt derelicti eventus, te potest experiri ad mutari, aut frigore copia valorem.

	Si vis ergo reverebuntur praestantiorum bonorum ordo bis __colon__ specificare.
	Sine coetus magnitudine:
		195 __semicolon__ 6543 __colon____colon__
	Cum coetus magnitudine:
		195 __semicolon__ 6543 __colon____colon__ 300

	Potes in range of artificiales exhibere:

	Te potest etiam extra range of quaerere artificiales exhibere:

Quam ut quaeram magis quam tempus?

- Conare quaerere numerus dierum, horarum, mutorum, vel seconds. Quod notitia potest esse genus vel __type_byte__, __type_word__, __type_dword__ __type_auto__ generis vel __type_qword__. etiam uti potes.
	- Conare quaerere aut pro multis milli- nanoseconds. Et data est genus vel __type_dword__ __type_qword__.
	- Conare quaerere date quod unix timestamp in finem. Type - __type_dword__. considerandum est quod hec est differentia inter current unix timestamp et salvus unum. Per quaerere investigatio scriptulos.
For example, if 30 days are written, then you are looking for 30 +/- 1 day from the current unix timestamp. The current unix timestamp can be easily viewed on the Internet.
Numquid non potest trucidabunt online ludos?

Est potest trucidabunt in notitia, quae est repono in client. Quidquid amputabuntur non concedebatur in calculonis servi. Ludos potest esse in diversis diversimode attribuatur. Unius ludio ludius in ludum et etiam aliqui ex data sit concedebatur in calculonis servi et quidam non.

Speedhack opus non est inventa X86 / X86 libraries aemulatores ad ludos non habent esse.\nAlso for an ART environment, speedhack does not work with Java timers. If the game uses them and you have an ART environment (usually Android 5 and above), then speedhack will not work.

Hoc ludo indutus sit tutela contra rationem SecNeo debugging ad praesidium. __app_name__ hoc praesidium non praetermittant. Per eam: et hoc non potest trucidabunt ludum.

Ne ut deprehensio a sarcina per anti-defraudat nomine.

Quae sunt symbola \"\" et \"# \', antequam processus vocaris?

Hoc signat quod genus continet quaestionem.
	"#" - quod est super lineam rectum in conspectu processus processus ab alia.
	"" - ante processus, processus est secundum carnem aliquis processus.
Tracing est typical quoniam debugging, sive caesim. Aliqui etiam id in custodiis. De more sit processum cum "#" signum processus est a conservanda.
Cur post applicationem ad institutionem vexillum suum et praestare institutionem, fiebant petitiones enim radix ius?

__app_name__ reinstalls temere data est ipsum ne et deprehendatur ab anti-defraudat. Radix enim iura necesse sunt, \"tacere\" quod uninstallation installation. Non licet de eis. In hoc casu, vos mos have ut manually Respondeo dicendum quod in omnibus petitiones ratio est installing applications.
Quod __pkg__? An hoc vel virus Troianorum? Et applicationem huius radix accessum ad tutum est?
Hoc est nomen basi __app_name__ sarcina. Fiebant aditus est tutum si radix est: __app_name__ downloaded from fontes confidebat.

Quid est album of installed __app_name__ in nomine applications quasi temere characterum seriei? Cur hanc petitionem ingenii profectus obvius radix? Quare, cum scribit quod radix non provisum est a launching __app_name__ __app_name__, sed quaedam abracadabra?
Quia __app_name__ utitur ad abscondere se a deprehendatur ab anti-defraudat.
Cur nunc nequiquam detecta fraude in latest versions de __app_name__ anticheats et interdum non?

Quia __app_name__ utitur diversis ex rebus deprehendatur per se celare anti-defraudat. Hoc includit temere a sarcina nomen et application. Installation invicem differunt. Try reinstalling __app_name__ Se regenerare possunt. Post haec fortasse anti-seductorem ad __app_name__ cessabunt sive scientia destruetur.
Cur non ludo est per applicationem album?
Quia hoc est a album of applications currit et non currit tua application. Curre, et tunc __app_name__ in eligere.
Why can Java applications not respond to speedhack on Android 5 and above?

Because speedhack is designed for games with native libraries. Your application is not. And since Android 5 used the environment of ART, instead of Dalvik, which makes it impossible to intercept Java timers. Do not do anything. The situation will not change in the future.
I used a different speedhack / hacking tool on Android 4 and everything worked. Now I put __app_name__ on Android 5 and above, but those methods do not work. Why?

Quia multa utilitate mutavit tuum sicut facere illud. Non est creata __app_name__ quod falsa mali quae est utilitas Si igitur uh! Illic \'haud talis res.\nTo test this, install __app_name__ on Android 4, and repeat all the same actions as in that utility. As a result, you will succeed. But this does not mean that these same methods will work on Android 5 and above.\nEt hoc est quod confirmavit ab experientia, saepe.

It is useful if you know how the value is coded in the game. For example, 29 rounds in one game can be found as '= 29 ~ 444444'. This is equivalent to 29 XOR 444444. In the video sample, the price was found 3888 through XOR with 444444, as '= 444444 ~ 3888'. After this, the replacement was made to '= 444444 ~ 1', which set the price to '1'. In another game, 125 gold is like '= 125 * 10'.

When you write '= 2 + 2 * 3', the keyword 'return' will be added before the formula: 'return 2 + 2 * 3'. However, you can specify this word yourself in a formula if you need a complex formula.
For example, '= a = 5; b = 7; return a * 4 + b * 8' will be executed as 'a = 5; b = 7; return a * 4 + b * 8'
